creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
This seems to be fixed upstream in alsa-lib-1.0.28 but ...

  /*
   * Deprecated variants that don't have enough underscores to be useful in more
   * strict namespaces.
   */
  #if __BSD_VISIBLE
  #define LITTLE_ENDIAN   _LITTLE_ENDIAN

http://git.alsa-project.org/?p=alsa-lib.git;a=commit;h=7a6e8ca
